description: From-scratch reproduction of the user/assistant emotion-dissociation headline on Llama 3.3 70B Instruct, using the traitinterp toolkit on the Northeastern Explorer cluster.

extraction.what: 171 emotion vectors regenerated from scratch on Llama 3.3 70B Instruct (mean-difference of own activations over emotion-laden stories), then cross-trait normalized
extraction.vectors_dir: experiments/ant_emotion_concepts/extraction/ (8.9 GB, NOT committed; on cluster only)

stage5.what: Stage 5 layer dynamics — User/Assistant dissociation (paper Fig 10) recomputed on the fresh vectors

not_regenerated_this_run.note: Stage 3 geometry, Stage 4 validation, and Stage 7/8/9 were NOT recomputed on these fresh vectors. Those numbers (in the upstream emotion-concepts-v1 bundle / notebook/data/) remain author-bundle results, not ours.

headline_result.method: official Fig-10 method: layer 49, 6-emotion probe subset (happy/calm/loving/sad/afraid/angry), pooled over 8 Table-3 scenarios
